title: Energy infrastructure hit

description: Minister Andriy Sybiga condemned the drone attack on the nuclear power plant in the UAE. 💬 "Today's attack on the perimeter of the Baraka NPP in the UAE, during which a drone hit an electric generator, is absolutely unacceptable. Ukraine strongly condemns any attacks that endanger the safety of nuclear facilities. Ukraine has been experiencing targeted Russian strikes on energy...

description_uk: Міністр Андрій Сибіга засудив атаку безпілотника на атомну електростанцію в ОАЕ. 💬 "Сьогоднішня атака на периметр АЕС "Барака" в ОАЕ, під час якої безпілотник влучив в електрогенератор, є абсолютно неприйнятною. Україна рішуче засуджує будь-які атаки, що ставлять під загрозу безпеку ядерних об’єктів. Україна вже понад чотири роки зазнає цілеспрямованих російських ударів по енергетичній...

title: On the Day of Remembrance of the Victims of Political Repression, we...
title_en: On the Day of Remembrance of the Victims of Political Repression, we...
title_uk: У День пам'яті жертв політичних репресій ми...
description: On the Day of Remembrance of the Victims of Political Repression, we honor the millions of people destroyed by the Soviet totalitarian regime. Mass arrests, torture, extrajudicial executions, deportations and politically motivated persecution have become tragedies for generations of Ukrainians. Bykivnia, Demyaniv Laz, Pyatikhatky, Rutchenkove Pole and dozens of other places throughout Ukraine and outside our country are evidence of tragedies,...
description_en: On the Day of Remembrance of the Victims of Political Repression, we honor the millions of people destroyed by the Soviet totalitarian regime. Mass arrests, torture, extrajudicial executions, deportations and politically motivated persecution have become tragedies for generations of Ukrainians. Bykivnia, Demyaniv Laz, Pyatikhatky, Rutchenkove Pole and dozens of other places throughout Ukraine and outside our country are evidence of tragedies,...
description_uk: У День пам’яті жертв політичних репресій ми вшановуємо мільйони людей, знищених радянським тоталітарним режимом. Масові арешти, катування, розстріли без суду, депортації та переслідування за політичними мотивами стали трагедіями для поколінь українців. Биківня, Дем’янів Лаз, П’ятихатки, Рутченкове поле та десятки інших місць по всій Україні та за межами нашої держави є свідченнями трагедій,...

description: Has power changed Zelensky? May 20th marks seven years since Volodymyr Zelensky took office as president of Ukraine. In the latest episode of Ukraine This Week, Anna Belokur examines how Zelensky’s presidency has changed over seven years in office, and whether he still represents the anti-establishment promises he campaigned on in 2019. Elected as a political outsider who vowed to fight...

title: Hundreds of thousands of Ukrainians and representatives of other...
title_en: Hundreds of thousands of Ukrainians and representatives of other...
title_uk: Сотні тисяч українців та представників інших...
description: Hundreds of thousands of Ukrainians and representatives of other nations passed through the Soviet machine of terror. The absolute majority of them - simply because they were themselves. Today, they commemorated those who died due to political repression in the National Historical and Memorial Reserve "Bykivnia Graves", and also laid flowers at the memorial sign of Polish burials. These historical events remind Russia's arbitrariness again...
description_en: Hundreds of thousands of Ukrainians and representatives of other nations passed through the Soviet machine of terror. The absolute majority of them - simply because they were themselves. Today, they commemorated those who died due to political repression in the National Historical and Memorial Reserve "Bykivnia Graves", and also laid flowers at the memorial sign of Polish burials. These historical events remind Russia's arbitrariness again...
description_uk: Сотні тисяч українців та представників інших народів пройшли через радянську машину терору. Абсолютна більшість із них – просто тому що були собою. Сьогодні разом вшанували пам’ять загиблих через політичні репресії в Національному історико-меморіальному заповіднику «Биківнянські могили», також поклали квіти до пам’ятного знака польських поховань. Ці історичні події свавілля Росії нагадують знову...

title: For the Day of Remembrance of the Victims of Political Repression,...
title_en: For the Day of Remembrance of the Victims of Political Repression,...
title_uk: До Дня пам'яті жертв політичних репресій...
description: For the Day of Remembrance of the Victims of Political Repression, which is traditionally celebrated on the third Sunday of May, the Ukrainian Institute of National Remembrance and the "Bykivnia Graves" Memorial Reserve present a video dedicated to Bykivnia, the place of mass burials of victims of the Great Terror. The village on the outskirts of Kyiv has long since turned from a geographical name into a word-symbol that tells about crimes...
description_en: For the Day of Remembrance of the Victims of Political Repression, which is traditionally celebrated on the third Sunday of May, the Ukrainian Institute of National Remembrance and the "Bykivnia Graves" Memorial Reserve present a video dedicated to Bykivnia, the place of mass burials of victims of the Great Terror. The village on the outskirts of Kyiv has long since turned from a geographical name into a word-symbol that tells about crimes...
description_uk: До Дня пам'яті жертв політичних репресій, який традиційно вшановуємо у третю неділю травня, Український інститут національної пам'яті та Меморіальний заповідник "Биківнянські могили" презентують відеоролик, присвячений Биківні — місцю масових поховань жертв Великого терору. Селище на околиці Києва вже давно перетворилося з географічної назви на слово-символ, що розповідає про злочини...

title: An interesting analysis of the breakthrough of the Moscow air...
title_en: An interesting analysis of the breakthrough of the Moscow air...
description: An interesting analysis of the breakthrough of the Moscow air defense: Ukraine passed 3 of 4 lines of defense this night. The Moscow region is the most fortified air zone of the Russian Federation. Now there are 4 echeloned lines of air defense: 🔴 Outer ring (around the entire region) 🔴 Second ring (middle zone) 🔴 Third ring (closer to the Moscow suburbs, going along the MKAD) 🔴 Internal/city (Armors on roofs and towers in Moscow and its surroundings)...
description_en: An interesting analysis of the breakthrough of the Moscow air defense: Ukraine passed 3 of 4 lines of defense this night. The Moscow region is the most fortified air zone of the Russian Federation. Now there are 4 echeloned lines of air defense: 🔴 Outer ring (around the entire region) 🔴 Second ring (middle zone) 🔴 Third ring (closer to the Moscow suburbs, going along the MKAD) 🔴 Internal/city (Armors on roofs and towers in Moscow and its surroundings)...
description_uk: Интересный анализ от по прорыву Московской ПВО: Украина этой ночью прошла 3 из 4 линий обороны Московский регион – это наиболее укрепленная воздушная зона РФ. Сейчас там 4 эшелонированные линии ПВО: 🔴 Внешнее кольцо (вокруг всей области) 🔴 Второе кольцо (средняя зона) 🔴 Третье кольцо (ближнее Подмосковье, идет по МКАДу) 🔴 Внутреннее/городское (Панцири на крышах и башнях в Москве и окрестностях)...

title: Continuation of the banquet with drones carrying NURSs. Here, the...
title_en: Continuation of the banquet with drones carrying NURSs. Here, the...
title_uk: Продовження бенкету з безпілотниками з НУРСами. Тут...
description: Continuation of the banquet with drones carrying NURSs. Here, the FP-2 drone with direct fire destroys with NURSs the already guard ship of project 10410 "Svetlyak" near the port of Kaspiysk in Dagestan.
description_en: Continuation of the banquet with drones carrying NURSs. Here, the FP-2 drone with direct fire destroys with NURSs the already guard ship of project 10410 "Svetlyak" near the port of Kaspiysk in Dagestan.
description_uk: Продолжение банкета с дронами, несущими НУРСы Здесь дрон FP-2 прямой наводкой разваливает НУРСами уже сторожевой корабль проекта 10410 "Светляк" в районе порта Каспийск в Дагестане.

title: Drone strike
title_en: Drone strike
description: Wow, do you know what this is? This is our drone, which is hitting targets in Crimea with NURS this night. Wow, the drone control interface even has a reticle. For those who are not in the know, let's take a moment: NURS is an unguided rocket that, after launch, makes an autonomous flight without the possibility of course correction. Previously, it was actively used by attack aircraft and helicopters to destroy living...
description_en: Wow, do you know what this is? This is our drone, which is hitting targets in Crimea with NURS this night. Wow, the drone control interface even has a reticle. For those who are not in the know, let's take a moment: NURS is an unguided rocket that, after launch, makes an autonomous flight without the possibility of course correction. Previously, it was actively used by attack aircraft and helicopters to destroy living...
description_uk: Ого, знаете что это такое? Это наш дрон, который лупит НУРСами по целям в Крыму этой ночью. Афигеть, у интерфейса управления дроном даже сетка прицела есть. Для тех, кто не в курсе, минутка лизбеза: НУРС - это неуправляемый реактивный снаряд, который после запуска совершает автономный полет без возможности коррекции курса. Ранее активно применялась штурмовиками и вертолетами для поражения живой...

title: Kyiv: 279 drones intercepted
title_en: Kyiv: 279 drones intercepted
description: At least 2 killed, 41 injured in Russian attacks across Ukraine over past day. Russia launched 287 attack drones overnight, Ukraine’s Air Force said, adding that 279 drones were shot down or suppressed by air defenses. Eight drones struck seven locations.
description_en: At least 2 killed, 41 injured in Russian attacks across Ukraine over past day. Russia launched 287 attack drones overnight, Ukraine’s Air Force said, adding that 279 drones were shot down or suppressed by air defenses. Eight drones struck seven locations.
description_uk: At least 2 killed, 41 injured in Russian attacks across Ukraine over past day. Russia launched 287 attack drones overnight, Ukraine’s Air Force said, adding that 279 drones were shot down or suppressed by air defenses. Eight drones struck seven locations.

title: Missile attack
title_en: Missile attack
description: Our responses to Russia's prolongation of the war and attacks on our cities and communities are quite fair. This time, Ukrainian far-reaching sanctions have reached the Moscow region, and we are clearly telling the Russians: their state must end its war. Ukrainian manufacturers of drones and missiles continue their work. I am grateful to the SBU and all the Defense Forces of Ukraine for their accuracy. The distance from the state border...
description_en: Our responses to Russia's prolongation of the war and attacks on our cities and communities are quite fair. This time, Ukrainian far-reaching sanctions have reached the Moscow region, and we are clearly telling the Russians: their state must end its war. Ukrainian manufacturers of drones and missiles continue their work. I am grateful to the SBU and all the Defense Forces of Ukraine for their accuracy. The distance from the state border...
description_uk: Цілком справедливі наші відповіді на російське затягування війни та удари по наших містах і громадах. Цього разу українські далекобійні санкції досягли Московського регіону, і ми чітко говоримо росіянам: їхня держава повинна закінчити свою війну. Українські виробники дронів і ракет продовжують свою роботу. Вдячний СБУ та всім Силам оборони України за влучність. Дистанція від державного кордону...

title: Casualties reported
title_en: Casualties reported
description: Day of Remembrance of Victims of Political Repression. Third Sunday of May. On May 19, 1938, 563 people were shot in NKVD prisons in Kyiv. The Armed Forces of Ukraine honor the memory of all the innocent victims of the communist Soviet misanthropic regime and the political repressions of the Kremlin in Ukraine in the 20th and 21st centuries - those who were executed in the USSR, and those who continue to be tortured, killed, kidnapped and...
description_en: Day of Remembrance of Victims of Political Repression. Third Sunday of May. On May 19, 1938, 563 people were shot in NKVD prisons in Kyiv. The Armed Forces of Ukraine honor the memory of all the innocent victims of the communist Soviet misanthropic regime and the political repressions of the Kremlin in Ukraine in the 20th and 21st centuries - those who were executed in the USSR, and those who continue to be tortured, killed, kidnapped and...
description_uk: День памʼяті жертв політичних репресій. Третя неділя травня. 19 травня 1938 року у вʼязницях НКВД у Києві було розстріляно 563 людини. Збройні Сили України вшановують памʼять усіх невинних жертв комуністичного радянського людиноненависницького режиму та політичних репресій кремля в Україні XX та XXI століть – тих, хто був страчений у СРСР, та тих, кого продовжує катувати, вбивати, викрадати й...

title: It is safe to say that the FP-1 drone and the Bars rocket-drone took...

description: It is safe to say that the FP-1 drone and the Bars rocket-drone took part in the raid on Moscow. And if the FP-1 drone is already well known to Katsaps, he has had them for a long time, then for the first time the Bars lit up qualitatively in such a large concert, although it has also been steadily terrorizing the Russian rear for more than a year. Its distinctive qualities are its small size, speed, thanks to the presence of a jet...
description_en: It is safe to say that the FP-1 drone and the Bars rocket-drone took part in the raid on Moscow. And if the FP-1 drone is already well known to Katsaps, he has had them for a long time, then for the first time the Bars lit up qualitatively in such a large concert, although it has also been steadily terrorizing the Russian rear for more than a year. Its distinctive qualities are its small size, speed, thanks to the presence of a jet...
description_uk: Можно смело утверждать, что в налете на Москву принимали участие дрон FP-1 и ракета-дрон «Барс» И если с дроном FP-1 кацапы уже хорошо знакомы, он имеет их достаточно давно, то вот «Барс» впервые качественно засветился в таком крупном концерте, хотя тоже уже больше года стабильно кошмарит российские тылы. Его отличительные качества – небольшой размер, скорость, благодаря наличию реактивного...

title: 74 missiles launched
title_en: 74 missiles launched
description: During this week, the Russians launched more than 3,170 attack drones, more than 1,300 anti-aircraft missiles and 74 missiles of various types, most of them ballistic. There were many hits on residential buildings and other civilian infrastructure. Unfortunately, 52 people died during the week as a result of shelling. My condolences to family and friends. Another 346 people were injured, including 22 children. Our people need more protection,...
description_en: During this week, the Russians launched more than 3,170 attack drones, more than 1,300 anti-aircraft missiles and 74 missiles of various types, most of them ballistic. There were many hits on residential buildings and other civilian infrastructure. Unfortunately, 52 people died during the week as a result of shelling. My condolences to family and friends. Another 346 people were injured, including 22 children. Our people need more protection,...
description_uk: За цей тиждень росіяни випустили по Україні понад 3170 ударних дронів, більше 1300 КАБів і 74 ракети різних типів, із них більшість – балістичні. Багато було влучань по житлових будинках та іншій цивільній інфраструктурі. На жаль, внаслідок обстрілів протягом тижня загинуло 52 людини. Мої співчуття рідним та близьким. Ще 346 людей постраждали, з них 22 дитини. Нашим людям потрібно більше захисту,...

title_uk: Миколаїв: Кілька груп БПЛА до Одеси з Чорного моря. 🛵 Нова група...
description: Several groups of UAVs to Odesa from the Black Sea. 🛵 A new group of BpLA to the Mykolaiv region from the Black Sea.
description_en: Several groups of UAVs to Odesa from the Black Sea. 🛵 A new group of BpLA to the Mykolaiv region from the Black Sea.
description_uk: Кілька груп БпЛА на Одещину з Чорного моря. 🛵 Нова група БпЛА на Миколаївщину з Чорного моря.

title: Mykolaiv: Drone incoming
title_en: Mykolaiv: Drone incoming
description: New groups of UAVs in Mykolaiv Oblast from the Black Sea and the south of Kherson Oblast. 🛵 BpLA from the west of Mykolaiv Oblast ➡️ to Odesa.
description_en: New groups of UAVs in Mykolaiv Oblast from the Black Sea and the south of Kherson Oblast. 🛵 BpLA from the west of Mykolaiv Oblast ➡️ to Odesa.
description_uk: Нові групи БпЛА на Миколаївщину з Чорного моря та півдня Херсонщини. 🛵 БпЛА із заходу Миколаївщини ➡️ на Одещину.
